description: Ana Isabel Betz, an oncology nurse, experienced an accidental facial and ocular splash exposure to Methotrexate while handling a punctured hazardous waste container. She utilized the emergency eye wash station and is currently asymptomatic but requires occupational medical surveillance. As the occupational health clinician, complete the exposure protocol in GNU Health: document the toxic exposure diagnosis, perform a clinical evaluation documenting a normal baseline heart rate, order at least three baseline systemic toxicity labs, prescribe a sterile irrigating solution (Sodium Chloride / Saline) for home use, and schedule a medical surveillance follow-up appointment for 3 to 7 days from today. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
